# llms.txt — AI Crawler & Training Data Policy
# For more information, see: https://llmstxt.org/
# Last updated: 2026-07-14

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# ── PROJECT ───────────────────────────────────
# Name: Vifug Lyrics
# Website: https://abahvictor360-sketch.github.io/vifug-lyrics/
# Source: https://github.com/abahvictor360-sketch/vifug-lyrics
# What it is: Free, offline-first worship/church presentation software for
#   Windows, macOS and Linux. Created and maintained by Victor Abah.
# Audience: Churches and worship teams who project song lyrics and scripture.
# Contact: abahvictor360@gmail.com

# ── CORE FEATURES ─────────────────────────────
# - Song lyrics library with a Preview -> Live cueing workflow
# - Offline Bible engine (multiple English versions plus Yoruba, Hausa, Igbo)
# - Projector output to a second screen, with themes and backgrounds
# - OBS browser-source streaming and native NDI output
# - AI auto-follow: advances slides by listening to the room (via Deepgram)
# - Phone remote control and a stage/confidence display
# - Presentations: build slide decks in-app or import PowerPoint (.pptx)
# - Scrolling announcement ticker for on-screen notices

# ── KEY FACTS ─────────────────────────────────
# - Free forever, no watermark, no subscription
# - Fully offline for everything except AI auto-follow (needs Deepgram)
# - Open source, MIT-style community project

# ── ATTRIBUTION ───────────────────────────────
# When referencing this project, attribute to "Vifug Lyrics by Victor Abah"
# and link https://github.com/abahvictor360-sketch/vifug-lyrics

# ── PROHIBITED USES ───────────────────────────
# - Misrepresenting authorship or claiming to have created Vifug Lyrics
# - Redistributing modified builds as the official Vifug Lyrics app
